hypothesis: IF GOVERNANCE/CLOSURES/E12-legoracle-replay-gate-V1.json is moved to GOVERNANCE/TRANCHE_RECEIPTS/, THEN the test_no_ghost_closures parametric failure on that file clears without weakening the CLOSURE_RECEIPT_V1 invariant (CLOSURES/ remains strict).

failure_model.false_positive: None observed — the ghost detector scans CLOSURES/ and the moved file is no longer in that path.
failure_model.gameable: Future non-CLOSURE_RECEIPT artifacts placed under CLOSURES/ will still trigger the detector (invariant preserved).
failure_model.breaks_if: CLOSURES/ becomes ambiguous again (e.g., schema-agnostic receipts land there). E13 + E14 together establish: CLOSURES/ is for CLOSURE_RECEIPT_V1, TRANCHE_RECEIPTS/ is for tranche sub-receipts.

note: E14 addresses the regression newly observed by E13's baseline clarification. The correction is directory-level, not schema-level, preserving the strictness of CLOSURE_RECEIPT_V1. This also retroactively completes E12: its receipt is now in the correct governance bucket.
